heading: Omitted
label: 1314f to 1315a Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1314f to 1315a were omitted as not of general application, and as covered by the Canal Zone Code. The Canal Zone Code was subsequently redesignated the Panama Canal Code by , and repealed by .Pub. L. 96–70, § 3303(b)Pub.
